meta.title: National Biodefense Strategy: Implementation and Implications (Part 1)
meta.description:
Part 1 of the Blue Ribbon Study Panel on Biodefense's November 2nd conference.

Current White House Perspectives on Biodefense featuring the Honorable Tim Ziemer and the Honorable Andrea Hall, followed by Congressional Perspectives featuring Representative Jim Langevin (D-RI).
